text.tspan: GEODE PATTERN: deploy the SAME service in MULTIPLE GEOGRAPHIC REGIONS;
each geode handles requests from nearby users;
active-active replication keeps shared data in sync.
(CRDT, multi-master, vector clocks, conflict resolution, etc.)
u2022 LOW LATENCY: every user hits a nearby geode
u2022 REGIONAL RESILIENCE: one geode down u2192 traffic routes to nearest neighbor
u2022 DATA RESIDENCY: keep EU data in EU geode (GDPR)
u2022 CHALLENGING: cross-region consistency (eventual / CRDT / strict-with-cost)
u2022 RELATED: deployment stamp (cellular) vs geode (geographic);
a region may host one or many stamps
